subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Baqa
subcodes.first_line: This is the Tablet of Eternity which cometh from the All-Glorious unto  he who hath attained the deep knowledge of God and did drink of the Kawthar of Life
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح البقا من لدی البهاء الی الذی فاز بعرفان الله و شرب کوثر الحیوان من
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
